one_line: A dashing British cavalry officer of the Central India Field Force, 1858.

appearance.age_look: Late 20s, lean and athletic with a rider’s build and squared shoulders.
appearance.face: Oval face with a straight nose, light complexion tanned by Indian sun, pronounced cheekbones, neat dark side-whiskers to mid-cheek, clean-shaven chin, default expression a confident, alert half-smile with sharp, focused eyes.
appearance.hair: Short, slightly wavy dark brown hair parted neatly to the left, kept just above the collar; wears a dark navy-blue forage cap with a stiff, flat top, narrow black leather peak, a thin gold band around the base, and a small brass regimental badge on the left front.
appearance.costume: Dark blue hussar officer’s tunic (dolman) closely fitted, with multiple horizontal rows of fine gold frogging across the chest and shoulders, gold piping on the cuffs, and a small standing collar edged in gold; dark blue riding breeches with a single broad gold stripe down the outer side of each leg; high black leather riding boots reaching just below the knee with a slight forward crease and subtle spurs; a narrow black leather waist belt with a brass buckle worn over the tunic; simple white linen shirt collar just visible at the neck; no cloak, but sleeves tailored snugly to show form; minimal jewellery aside from a small silver ring on the right hand.
appearance.signature: Long, slightly curved cavalry sabre with a brass three-bar hilt, leather-bound grip, and polished steel blade, carried at his left hip in a steel scabbard with brass fittings attached to a black leather sword belt.

ref_desc: A lean late-twenties British hussar officer with dark side-whiskers, short dark brown hair under a navy forage cap, wearing a dark blue gold-braided hussar tunic, blue breeches with gold stripe, black riding boots, and a brass-hilted sabre at his left hip.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of a late-twenties British hussar officer from 1858 in India: a lean, athletic man with an oval, lightly sun-tanned face, straight nose, sharp eyes, and neat dark side-whiskers to mid-cheek, hair short, slightly wavy dark brown and parted left, wearing a dark navy-blue forage cap with a flat top, black leather peak, thin gold band, and small brass badge on the left front. He wears a fitted dark blue hussar dolman with multiple horizontal rows of fine gold frogging across the chest and shoulders, gold-edged standing collar, and gold-piped cuffs, over a just-visible white linen shirt collar. His dark blue riding breeches have a single bold gold stripe down each outer leg, tucked into high black leather riding boots with subtle spurs. A narrow black leather waist belt with brass buckle cinches the tunic, and he has a small silver ring on his right hand. At his left hip hangs his signature weapon: a long, slightly curved cavalry sabre with a brass three-bar hilt, leather-bound grip, and polished steel blade in a steel scabbard with brass fittings on a black leather sword belt. Use a palette of dark navy blue, gold, black, brass, and warm light skin tones, showing front, side, and back views to clearly display face, hair, uniform details, and sabre placement.
